title: ononis repens subsp. spinosiformis
intro: Ononis repens subsp. spinosiformis, also known as the Spiny Restharrow, is a subspecies of the Ononis repens plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues such as diarrhea, dysentery, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ononis repens subsp. spinosiformis include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
